topic: Coronary artery anatomy explained in 60 seconds
caption:
Your heart is a powerhouse, but it needs its own dedicated fuel lines! ❤️ Ever wondered how your heart muscle gets the oxygen it needs to keep beating? It's all thanks to the intricate network of coronary arteries. These vital vessels are the unsung heroes, delivering life-sustaining blood directly to the heart itself. Learn about the Left Main, LAD, LCx, and RCA, and why understanding their anatomy is crucial for preventing heart disease. Knowing where these critical arteries are and what they do can literally be life-saving. Don't wait until it's too late to understand your body's most important pump. 🩺✨

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to understand their heart better. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health insights. Don't forget — knowledge is power when it comes to your health!
